Code analysis: OpenSIS v9.2 standard schema does not include a lockers table. Checked OpensisSchemaMysqlInc.sql from GitHub repository https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OS4ED/openSIS-Classic/master/install/OpensisSchemaMysqlInc.sql - no locker table definition found. No CREATE TABLE statement for lockers exists in any environment setup script.

privileged_info_summary: The add_locker_inventory task is a synthetic benchmark task using OpenSIS v9.2, a real open-source student information system. The task expects to create three locker records with IDs N-100, N-101, and N-102, each with specific combination codes (12-34-56, 25-10-45, 00-11-22 respectively) and all located in 'North Hall'. The admin login credentials are username 'admin' and password 'Admin@123'. The locker data is entirely synthetic and created for testing purposes. Critical note: The locker management feature does not exist in standard OpenSIS v9.2, and no database locker table is created by the environment initialization scripts, meaning this task cannot execute successfully in its current configuration.
